name: Julia Newman
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Julia Newman, a proud Coloradan, attended medical school at University of Colorado. She completed her Internal Medicine Residency at Boston Medical Center. Given her passion for communication and patient-centered care, she did a Palliative Care fellowship at Beth Israel prior to her Pulmonary and Critical Care fellowship at Boston Medical Center.
education: University of Colorado School of Medicine
fellowship: Hospice and Palliative Care Fellowship at Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center, Pulmonary and Critical Care at Boston Medical Center
